Stev3 Patch Lab

Category: Reverse Engineering
Difficulty: Medium

A legacy client has a hidden diagnostics switch.
It validates a token with transformed byte checks and cross-index constraints.
Reverse the bytecode and recover the valid token.

Run:
  java Stev3PatchLab
or
  java Stev3PatchLab "CH4KR4X2{example}"

Flag format:
  CH4KR4X2{...}
